entities.name: GENOMIC SELECTION
entities.description: The use of genome-wide marker information for prediction of the genetic worth of untested individuals

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE MARKER INFORMATION
entities.description: Genetic data used to predict the worth of individuals in genomic selection

entities.name: PLANTS
entities.description: Biological organisms targeted for improvement via genomic selection and breeding

entities.name: ANIMALS
entities.description: Biological organisms where genomic selection has been applied

entities.name: GENOMIC PROFILING
entities.description: The process of analyzing the genome to support genomic selection

entities.name: PHENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of measuring observable traits to support genomic selection and machine learning

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The practice of improving plant characteristics through selective breeding

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The rate of improvement in the genetic value of a population

entities.name: BREEDER'S EQUATION
entities.description: A mathematical framework used to determine the rate of genetic gain

entities.name: GENOMIC PREDICTION
entities.description: The process of predicting the genetic value of individuals using markers

entities.name: PARAMETRIC METHODS
entities.description: Genomic prediction methods based on specific statistical distribution assumptions

entities.name: NON-PARAMETRIC METHODS
entities.description: Genomic prediction methods that do not assume a specific statistical distribution

entities.name: GS MODELS
entities.description: Computational models used to implement genomic selection

entities.name: HIGH THROUGHPUT GENOTYPING
entities.description: Rapid identification of genetic variants across many individuals

entities.name: OMICS SYSTEMS
entities.description: Integrated biological data systems including genomics, proteomics, and metabolomics

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: Computational tools used for predicting plant performance from complex datasets

entities.name: PLANT PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The observable characteristics and productivity of a plant
